calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Susan Crozier, CSR# 4761. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2002 Continued To Jul-29-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. $350.00 sanctions imposed against pltf in pro per. Osc is reset to 7-29-02. Proceedings reported by Joyce Long. (212)
